text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During an interview, Ines Fujin confidently
reaffirms her goal of winning the Japanese Derby
as the most popular Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've worked towards this dream together, and
the deep trust we share has left her with an
unwavering resolve. That much is clear from the
look in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan has also been spurred onward by Ines
Fujin's efforts. She explains that watching Ines
helped her to bring her own dream into focus.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Ines Fujin has a dream of her own, and it's one
she means to realize. After all, her sisters have
come to the Japanese Derby to cheer her on!
